description_long: This is a mid-century modern style cabinet featuring a warm, reddish-brown wooden frame and three prominent blue front doors, each equipped with a pale yellow handle. The cabinet stands on four tapered legs, giving it an elevated and elegant appearance. The wood grain is visible on all non-blue surfaces, adding a natural texture to the design. The blue doors are slightly protruding, creating a dynamic visual contrast with the rest of the cabinet. The back and sides are plain wood, with no visible openings or features. The overall construction suggests it is designed for storage, likely with internal shelves or compartments behind the doors.
description: A mid-century modern wooden cabinet with three blue doors and yellow handles, standing on tapered legs. The design features a warm wood finish and bold color contrast.
description_view_0: Front view showing three blue doors with yellow handles and the full width of the cabinet.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinet, the wood grain, and the protrusion of the blue doors and handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden back with no visible doors, handles, or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the wood grain and the side profile of the blue doors and handles.
